home.heroSubtitle: Premium jewellery for the discerning Moroccan woman. Exclusive design, cash on delivery only.
home.qualityTitle: Precise details, noble materials, an exceptional experience
home.qualityDescription: Every piece is designed as a signature: noble materials that never tarnish, a lasting radiance, elegance that accompanies you everywhere. Cash on delivery, for complete peace of mind.
home.feature1Desc: Gold-plated 316L steel — never tarnishes, never rusts. Brilliant-cut zircons for royal radiance.
home.feature2Desc: Nationwide delivery in 24H and 48H, order tracking and dedicated WhatsApp support.
home.feature3Desc: Pay only when your parcel arrives. No online payment — simplicity and trust.
home.aboutP1: GUMÜÇROYAL is a premium jewellery house dedicated to the Moroccan woman. We don't sell products — we create pieces By GUMÜÇROYAL.
home.aboutP2: Every creation: 316L stainless steel, brilliant-cut zircons, gold-plated finish.
home.commitmentText: At GUMÜÇ ROYAL, every piece is selected with exacting standards: noble steel that never tarnishes, a radiance designed to last. We believe every woman deserves accessible luxury — safe, uncompromising, an elegance that accompanies her everywhere, day after day.
home.commitmentBadge: 316L stainless steel — a radiance that never tarnishes.
home.faqDescription: Everything you need to know about ordering, delivery and COD.
home.faq1A: Choose your piece, add to cart, enter name and phone. COD delivery across Morocco.
home.faq2A: 24H and 48H depending on city. Casablanca and Rabat often within 24H. WhatsApp notification included.
home.faq3A: Cash on delivery only. No bank card, no online payment.

productPage.materialP1: 316L = medical grade. Hypoallergenic. Resists water, sweat and daily wear.
productPage.materialP2: Gold-plated finish — never tarnishes, never rusts. Brilliant-cut zircons with remarkable sparkle.
